AMENDMENT NO. 3 TO MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

between MegaCloud Inc. ("Vendor") and Customer Corp. ("Customer")
Effective Date: July 1, 2025

This Amendment No. 3 (the "Amendment") further amends the Master Services
Agreement effective January 1, 2022, as previously amended (together, the
"Agreement") between Vendor and Customer.

1. BACKGROUND
1.1 Vendor experienced a service incident affecting the Services during
the second quarter of 2025. In recognition of this incident, Vendor agrees
to issue Customer a monthly service credit as set forth below.

2. SERVICE CREDIT
2.1 In recognition of the Q2 2025 service incident, Vendor shall issue
Customer a monthly service credit of $200.00, effective July 1, 2025
through June 30, 2026. Any unused credit balance shall roll over to the
following month.

3. NO OTHER CHANGES
3.1 Except as expressly modified by this Amendment, all other terms of the
Agreement (as previously amended) remain in full force and effect.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Amendment as of the
Effective Date above.
